description: Learn the fundamentals of baking, including measuring ingredients, mixing, and baking techniques.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: flour, sugar, eggs, butter, and baking powder.
Measure out the ingredients accurately using measuring cups and spoons.
Mix the dry ingredients together in a bowl.
Cream the butter and sugar together in a separate bowl.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Combine the wet and dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
Pour the batter into a greased baking pan and smooth the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Let the cake cool before serving.
